subject: rotations for new trading track participants

emails.subject: RE: Rotations for new Trading Track Participants
emails.subject_base: Rotations for new Trading Track Participants
emails.body: RE: Rotations for new Trading Track Participants Jason Huang has already done his rotation in the west as an analyst. Please move him into another rotation. Thanks, Mike To: Will, Lloyd; Superty, Robert; White, Stacey W.; McMichael Jr., Ed; Gossett, Jeffrey C.; Grigsby, Mike; Gaskill, Chris; Meyn, Jim; Baughman Jr., Don

emails.subject: RE: Rotations for new Trading Track Participants
emails.subject_base: Rotations for new Trading Track Participants
emails.body: Hi Mike, Yes, he is currently in Fundamentals under Chris and will move to Structuring next May, having already spent time in your group. earlier in the year. Did you speak with Elizabeth and also, do you have the form completed so I can forward to legal. thanks, Karen. To: Buckley, Karen

emails.subject: RE: Rotations for new Trading Track Participants
emails.subject_base: Rotations for new Trading Track Participants
emails.body: I just spoke to Elizabeth. I told her that we would move her out of Trading Track and in to the Analyst pool. I also told her about setting a performance plan going forward and that you would be contacting her. She knows that she will be working as an Analyst for the west. I will complete the plan and forward to you. Mike To: Grigsby, Mike

emails.subject: RE: Rotations for new Trading Track Participants
emails.subject_base: Rotations for new Trading Track Participants
emails.body: thanks Mike, Karen. To: Buckley, Karen
